title: cissus coccinea
intro: Cissus coccinea, also known as the heartleaf veldt grape, is a type of climber plant native to South Africa. It is a perennial vine with heart-shaped leaves and has been used for centuries in traditional medicine due to its medicinal properties. The plant is rich in antioxidants and has anti-inflammatory properties, which have been shown to provide health benefits such as reducing pain and inflammation, and improving cardiovascular health. Cissus coccinea is often prepared as a herbal tea or tincture, and has also been used in the form of capsules or infusions for various health issues.
